context: 2015 was Kygo's breakout year — the Bergen-born tropical house producer placed three singles in the top 10 and became Norway's biggest musical export since a-ha. Norwegian DJ duo SeeB also made their mark remixing Mike Posner's track into a global smash. Adele's 'Hello' dominated late in the year with 7 weeks at #1. Norway was emerging as a major hub for electronic dance music production.

tracks.title: I Took a Pill in Ibiza (SeeB Remix)
